orb_30m.name: ORB 30m
orb_30m.description: Opening Range Breakout on the first 30 minutes of RTH session

params.Entry: First 5m close beyond the range (max 1 trade/day)
params.Stop: Far side of opening range (price-based, not time-based)

ema_cross_5m.name: EMA Cross 5m
ema_cross_5m.description: EMA 9/100 crossover on 5-minute RTH bars with trend and volatility filters. Long only — short crosses exit an open long but do not open shorts.

params.Direction: Long only (short side is a real edge but redundant with ORB — corr +0.375 fails the <0.3 gate)
params.Entry: Long cross bar close, market order
params.Exit: Short cross exits long (no new short) or EOD flat (whichever first)

dc_exit3.name: DC Mean Reversion
dc_exit3.description: Donchian Channel daily mean reversion — buy when RTH close < prior 10-day low; exit on first up-close or 5-day time stop. Long only.

params.Signal: Daily close < prior 10-day low (DC lower band, shifted)
params.Exit (up-close): First day where close > signal-day close

Strategy requires real-time ADX(14), +DI(14), -DI(14) indicator state as entry/exit triggers, not price-pattern-only signals. ADX threshold recalibration (20→25) is a tuning parameter on an indicator, not a price action rule. Breakout template architecture does not support indicator-gated entries or indicator-collapse exits; it requires price levels (ranges, bands, breakout bars) as primary signals. This strategy is indicator-adaptive and violates the rule that backtest templates work from bar OHLCV alone without live indicator state.

investor_verdict.verdict:
No allocation today. You have a sharp backtest (Sharpe 1.35, Calmar 0.92) but zero live confirmation—four underwater trades and -26.56 pts average slippage is a red flag that your edge either doesn't survive real execution friction or hasn't yet. Single-market concentration on MNQ is acceptable for a micro fund at this stage, but the live P&L and slippage gap demand resolution before institutional capital arrives.

Your one concrete next step: Run 40–50 more live trades (roughly 8–12 weeks at your current pace) to reach statistical significance, documenting slippage, fill quality, and win rate in real markets. If you hit 35%+ win rate and <10 pts average slippage by then, you'll have earned serious consideration. Until then, you're still in the lab.

projections.note: 16-year backtest projection, 1 contract each. ALL legs gated by the live trailing-252-trade-day PF rule (pf252>1.0, same as score_engine) and annualized over each leg's full calendar span. Book is ORB+EMA+DC (MNQ); Gold/Crude were retracted + removed 2026-06-28 (look-ahead artifact). EMA is long-only.

ytd_equity.note: 2026 YTD running equity, 1 contract each, deployed config (trend20 ORB, gated long-only EMA, DC). Backtest/OOS model — not realized fills.
